name: Beacon ROI Calculator
based_on: A B2B SaaS ROI / savings calculator landing page — the lead-gen pattern marketing teams build to turn a few inputs (spend, team size, volume) into a projected-savings number with a chart and a gated 'email me the report' CTA. Modeled on an AI customer-support tool that auto-resolves a share of tickets.
summary: A B2B ROI / lead-gen calculator: enter current support spend, team size, and ticket volume, and a live results panel computes projected annual savings, payback, and reclaimed hours with animated SVG charts, behind a gated 'email me the report' CTA.
sections: Compact hero with value prop, proof stats, and a scroll-to-calculator CTA
Inputs panel: support spend, team size, and ticket volume (number fields synced to range sliders)
Live results panel: net annual savings headline plus monthly savings, reclaimed hours, payback, and return multiple
Before/after bar chart (monthly cost today vs with the product) drawn in SVG
Cumulative net-savings area chart over 12 months
'Where the savings come from' three-step explanation of the model
Gated 'email me the report' lead-capture CTA with validation and success state
Social proof: customer logos and a testimonial
setup_questions: What does your product save customers — time, money, or both — and what's the product called?
What are the 2-3 input variables a visitor types in, and the formula that turns them into savings?
What's the lead-capture CTA at the end — what do they get for handing over an email (a PDF report, a demo, a custom quote)?
Any brand details — product name, accent color, a one-line value prop, and a customer quote I can show?
photo_terms: business analytics chart blue gradient dashboard
minimal data dashboard ui dark mode
